title: Support livestock work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support livestock work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for livestock work

pcs.text: Collect required materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to lists provided and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to lists provided and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to lists provided and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements.

pcs.text: Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials and equipment.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment, machinery and PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment, machinery and PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment, machinery and PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for livestock work

elements.title: Undertake livestock work as directed

pcs.text: Follow instructions and directions provided by supervisor, and seek clarification when necessary

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow instructions and directions provided by supervisor, and seek clarification when necessary.

pcs.text: Interact with staff and customers in a professional manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interact with staff and customers in a professional manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interact with staff and customers in a professional manner.

pcs.text: Undertake livestock work in a safe, hygienic and environmentally appropriate manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake livestock work in a safe, hygienic and environmentally appropriate manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake livestock work in a safe, hygienic and environmentally appropriate manner.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake livestock work as directed

elements.title: Handle materials and equipment

pcs.text: Handle and transport materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return materials to store or dispose of appropriately.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery according to supervisor instructions
